title: meliosma dilleniifolia subsp. cuneifolia
intro: Meliosma dilleniifolia subsp. cuneifolia, also known as the 'Mountain Meliosma', is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliosmaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been found to contain alkaloids and other bioactive compounds with potential health benefits. The medicinal properties of Meliosma dilleniifolia subsp. cuneifolia have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make tea, tonic, or syrup to harness its medicinal benefits.
